metadata.name: Process a Disability Waiver of Premium Claim

description: A policyholder has become totally disabled and is filing a claim to have their life insurance premiums waived.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and verify their policy includes a Waiver of Premium rider.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the policy has the required rider.

nodes.task_description: Request medical records and an Attending Physician's Statement to prove total disability as defined in the policy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the customer the required forms and a list of necessary documents.

nodes.task_description: Once the claim is approved, set the policy to waive all future premium payments.

expected_outcome.value: Agent approves the claim and updates the policy status to 'Premium Waived'.
